productDisplayName: Kiara Women Sporty Look Brown Handbag
description: Stylish and practical bag in brown from kiara which is extendible .  Roomy and comfortable to carry, the leather effect fabric and red, black and silver stripe will give a sophisticated look to any outfit.Height: 28cm or 40cmWidth: 30cmDepth: 10cmMade of synthetic leather for durabilityFor smaller size bag: small straps which slide flat when not in useFor larger size bag: extra fabric is tucked inside bag ready for use with two handles which will Fit over the shoulderOne main zipped compartment with two internal zipped pockets and organiser pouchesOne long detachable handle for use with both extended and smaller bagZipped pocket and press stud pocket on frontCareWipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dust
